The '''Timja Suns''' were a group of [[Star/Legends|stars]]<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> located in the [[Timja system/Legends|Timja system]], a part of the [[Suolriep sector/Legends|Suolriep sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> of [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> At some point by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Beatas]] spent a short [[Time/Legends|time]] employed in the Timja [[Star system/Legends|system]]. During his stay there, Beatas was exposed to too much of the Timja Suns' [[electromagnetic radiation]], resulting in the region of his otherwise [[Color/Legends|dark green]] skin around his [[Eye/Legends|eyebrows]] turning yellow.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Timja Suns were mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Timja system, and therefore the stars, in grid square S-8.<ref name="TEA" />
